en: "I loathe my life; I will give free utterance to my complaint; I will speak in the bitterness of my soul.
zh: “我厭惡我的性命， 我要盡情吐苦水， 傾訴心中的痛苦。

en: I will say to God, Do not condemn me; let me know why you contend against me.
zh: 我要對 神說：不要定我有罪， 請告訴我你為甚麼與我相爭。

en: Does it seem good to you to oppress, to despise the work of your hands and favor the designs of the wicked?
zh: 壓迫無辜， 又棄絕你手所作的， 卻喜悅惡人的計謀，你都以為美嗎？

en: Have you eyes of flesh? Do you see as man sees?
zh: 你的眼不是肉眼， 你觀看不像人觀看，

en: Are your days as the days of man, or your years as a man's years,
zh: 你的日子不如人的日子， 你的年歲不像人的年歲，

en: that you seek out my iniquity and search for my sin,
zh: 以致你追究我的罪孽， 細察我的罪過嗎？

en: although you know that I am not guilty, and there is none to deliver out of your hand?
zh: 你知道我並沒有罪， 但沒有人能救我脫離你的手。

en: Your hands fashioned and made me, and now you have destroyed me altogether.
zh: 你的手塑我造我， 但一轉過來你就要毀滅我。

en: Remember that you have made me like clay; and will you return me to the dust?
zh: 求你記念你造我如摶泥， 你還要使我歸於塵土嗎？

en: Did you not pour me out like milk and curdle me like cheese?
zh: 你不是把我倒出來像倒奶， 又使我凝結像乳酪凝固嗎？

en: You clothed me with skin and flesh, and knit me together with bones and sinews.
zh: 你以皮肉為衣給我穿上， 以筋骨接絡我；

en: You have granted me life and steadfast love, and your care has preserved my spirit.
zh: 你賜我生命，又向我施慈愛， 你的眷顧保守我的心靈。

en: Yet these things you hid in your heart; I know that this was your purpose.
zh: 這些事你都藏在你的心裡， 我知道這是你的旨意。

en: If I sin, you watch me and do not acquit me of my iniquity.
zh: 我若犯罪，你就鑒察， 絕不赦免我的罪孽；

en: If I am guilty, woe to me! If I am in the right, I cannot lift up my head, for I am filled with disgrace and look on my affliction.
zh: 我若有罪，就有禍了； 我若有理，也不敢抬頭， 飽嘗羞辱，看看自己的苦難。

en: And were my head lifted up, you would hunt me like a lion and again work wonders against me.
zh: 我若昂首自得，你就如獅子獵我 ， 又在我身上彰顯你驚人的大能。

en: You renew your witnesses against me and increase your vexation toward me; you bring fresh troops against me.
zh: 你重新設立見證攻擊我， 對我加增你的忿怒， 派兵輪流攻擊我。

en: "Why did you bring me out from the womb? Would that I had died before any eye had seen me
zh: 你為甚麼使我出母胎呢？ 我不如死去，無人得見我，

en: and were as though I had not been, carried from the womb to the grave.
zh: 這樣，就像從來沒有我一樣， 一出母腹就被送入墳墓。

en: Are not my days few? Then cease, and leave me alone, that I may find a little cheer
zh: 我的日子不是很少嗎？請住手，轉離我， 使我在往黑暗死蔭之地以先，

en: before I go- and I shall not return- to the land of darkness and deep shadow,
zh: 在去而不返之前， 可以喜樂片刻；

en: the land of gloom like thick darkness, like deep shadow without any order, where light is as thick darkness."
zh: 那地黑暗，如死蔭的幽暗， 毫無秩序，即使有光也像幽暗。”
